title: satureja anagae
intro: Satureja anagae, also known as Anagae savory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Satureja anagae include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce stress, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Satureja anagae is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its therapeutic benefits.
